failure_reason: Promoted the next observed presence resonance relationship read family into the BML native front door. GET /api/concepts/{concept_id}/carried-by and GET /api/presences/{presence_id}/resonances now read graph_edges/graph_nodes through BML/Postgres handlers, emit native proof headers, and are wired through Traefik, Hostinger canaries, public verification, and runtime-surface tests. runtime_surface_report moved local capable routes from 87 to 89 and includes both route patterns. The generic form-kernel-rust check --routes still reports the same 14 unresolved names on this branch and origin/main, so that strict resolver failure is pre-existing catalog debt. Docker and local Postgres were unavailable, so live DB-backed native curl proof is deferred to deploy canaries/public verification.
